title: clematis fusca
intro: Clematis fusca, also known as the leatherflower or brown clematis, is a type of flowering vine native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and to soothe digestive issues. The health benefits of clematis fusca include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Clematis fusca can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its roots can be used to make a medicinal oil or salve.
